# Æther Wealth

> A private bank in your pocket. Æther Wealth unifies investments, insurance, trust and estate planning in a single luxury mobile dashboard for individuals, advisors and family offices.

## Pages

- [Overview](/): Private wealth dashboard — net worth, accounts, activity.
- [Investments](/portfolio): Holdings, allocation and performance across your portfolio.
- [Insurance](/protect): Life, property and liability coverage in one private vault.
- [Trust & Estate](/legacy): Wills, trusts, healthcare directives and beneficiaries.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Essential, Private and Family Office tiers.
- [Sign In](/signin): Access your private wealth vault.
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create your private wealth vault.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
